ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "application_key" TEXT /* Unique key for each application to use in API calls */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent group for hierarchical grouping */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the group (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_groups" (
  "sub_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-group */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the sub-group belongs to */,
  "sub_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-group */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sub-group (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the request belongs to */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the request belongs to */,
  "include_sub_groups" INTEGER /* Whether to include sub-groups in the response */,
  "page_index" INTEGER /* Page index of the response */,
  "page_size" INTEGER /* Page size of the response */,
  "request_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the request */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the request */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the request and generate the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the response belongs to */,
  "response_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the response */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* Code of the response (e.g., 200, 404) */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Body of the response */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., success, error) */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to generate the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_requests" (
  "user_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request */,
  "request_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_requests_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being audited */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being audited */,
  "audit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the audit */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the audit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being logged */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being logged */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being analyzed */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being analyzed */,
  "analytic_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytic */,
  "analytic_data" TEXT /* Data of the analytic */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., user engagement, API usage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_analytics" (
  "application_analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application analytic */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being analyzed */,
  "analytic_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytic */,
  "analytic_data" TEXT /* Data of the analytic */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., user engagement, API usage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_analytics_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_analytics" (
  "group_analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group analytic */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group being analyzed */,
  "analytic_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytic */,
  "analytic_data" TEXT /* Data of the analytic */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., user engagement, API usage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_analytics_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_group_analytics" (
  "sub_group_analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-group analytic */,
  "sub_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-group being analyzed */,
  "analytic_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytic */,
  "analytic_data" TEXT /* Data of the analytic */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., user engagement, API usage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_group_analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_group_analytics_sub_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_group_id") REFERENCES sub_groups ("sub_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_analytics" (
  "request_analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request analytic */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being analyzed */,
  "analytic_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytic */,
  "analytic_data" TEXT /* Data of the analytic */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., user engagement, API usage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_analytics_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_analytics" (
  "response_analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response analytic */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being analyzed */,
  "analytic_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytic */,
  "analytic_data" TEXT /* Data of the analytic */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., user engagement, API usage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_analytics_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)
